name: briefed
description: briefed: adaptive context engine for AI coding tools. Pre-extracts codebase structure into CLAUDE.md plus per-prompt adaptive context injection.

plugins.name: briefed
plugins.description: Pre-extracts codebase structure (symbols, schemas, routes, env vars, deep LLM annotations) into a CLAUDE.md skeleton plus per-prompt adaptive context injection. Cuts orientation tokens 30-70% with no impact on correctness.
